//: The client layer typechecked in isolation (#38). It is the one part of the repo that runs in a browser, so it — and only it — gets the DOM lib and `checkJs`. Kept separate from the root config so the Node pipeline stays DOM-free: a stray `document` or `fetch` in `src/` should not typecheck. The seam-3 test lives here too, because it imports the `.js` module and needs `allowJs` to resolve it.
